name: Spell Recycler
name_jp: マジック・リサイクラー
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Spell Card in your Graveyard; send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard, and if you do, return the target to the bottom of your Deck.
mnst_eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Spell Card in your Graveyard; send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard, and if you do, return the target to the bottom of your Deck.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Spell Card in your Graveyard; send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard, and if you do, return the target to the bottom of your Deck.

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
